nation: Conseil des Montagnais de Unamen Shipu
economic_notes: Band owns/operates: Corporation de développement économique de Unamen Shipu (100%), Voyages Inter-Nations et Associés inc. (33.3%), Pêcheries Unamen Shipu s.e.c. (51%), Pourvoirie Étamamiou inc. (100%), Société Mukutan inc. (100%), Les Pêcheries Amik Unamen (50%). COVID-19 related deferred revenues noted across multiple programs.
notes: Qualified audit opinion (opinion avec réserve) due to two unaudited components: Les Pêcheries Amik Unamen (50% owned, valued at $980,141, no financial statements available since Dec 2018) and Centre de santé Unamen Shipu (previously under court-appointed administrator until March 2019, no audited financials since April 2020). The revenue schedule (Annexe A) was cut off in the provided text so total_government_transfers and osr could not be fully determined. Annual debt service calculated as principal repayment on long-term debt ($785,165) plus lease obligation repayment ($42,073). Restricted cash includes Encaisse-Réserve ($958,497) and Encaisse-Affectation ($1,361,685) and Fonds en fiducie ($12,985). The statement includes a financing deficit presentation required by ISC that is not part of PSAS. Two ongoing legal disputes with air transport suppliers.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
